name: Brand Management

description: Ability to establish, organize, analyze, administer, and report on all aspects of a set of legally binding rights and obligations between two or more legal entities.

name: Agreement Definition
description: Ability to establish and identify an agreement.

name: Agreement Establishment
description: Ability to declare an agreement.

name: Agreement Identification
description: Ability to recognize an agreement.

name: Agreement Structuring
description: Ability to formulate and construct a binding agreement encompassing such things as eligibility, valuation, terms and conditions, period or duration, and termination privileges.

name: Agreement Eligibility Determination
description: Ability to ascertain that a customer or partner is qualified for an agreement.

name: Agreement Price Determination
description: Ability to formulate monetary or non-monetary amounts owed, resulting from the execution of an agreement.

name: Agreement Standard Price Determination
description: Ability to aggregate one or more predefined product or offer prices into a baseline starting point for agreement price finalization.

name: Agreement Custom Price Determination
description: Ability to set specific agreement pricing that considers standard pricing, agreement terms and conditions, and risk.

name: Agreement Price Finalization
description: Ability to determine agreement pricing that considers standard pricing, custom pricing, and customer or partner negotiations.

name: Agreement Validation
description: Ability to ensure that an agreement conforms to internal and external policies as well as the intentions of the parties.

name: Agreement Intentions Verification
description: Ability to ascertain that an agreement conforms to the organization's objectives.

name: Agreement Policy Conformance Verification
description: Ability to determine if an agreement is in accordance with all applicable enterprise policies.

name: Agreement Term Management
description: Ability to establish, modify, and interpret a legally enforceable condition set forth within the bounds of an agreement.

name: Agreement Standard Term Definition
description: Ability to aggregate one or more predefined product or offer terms into a baseline starting point for agreement terms definition.

name: Agreement Custom Term Definition
description: Ability to set specific agreement terms considering standard terms and risk.

name: Agreement Term Finalization
description: Ability to determine agreement terms that consider standard terms, custom terms, and customer or partner negotiations.

name: Agreement Term/Policy Matching
description: Ability to associate an agreement term with a policy.

name: Agreement Formalization
description: Ability to aggregate terms, risks, pricing, and related agreement elements into a finalized, executable form suitable to all parties.

name: Agreement Structure Aggregation
description: Ability to align and validate the collective set of agreement risks, terms, price, and parties as a prelude to finalizing an agreement.

name: Agreement Content Standardization
description: Ability to ensure that the structure of an agreement aligns to defined practices in order to ready it for finalization.

name: Agreement Preference Management
description: Ability to capture, represent, analyze, and act upon explicit or implicit inclinations, leanings, likings, predispositions, penchants, or options, expressed formally or informally, as determined or derived from a combination of sources and associated with an agreement.

name: Agreement Preference Definition
description: Ability to establish and identify an agreement preference.

name: Agreement Preference Interpretation
description: Ability to derive the meaning of one or a combination of preferences within an agreement or across multiple related agreements.

name: Agreement Lifecycle Management
description: Ability to manage the operation of an agreement from execution to termination and beyond, including amendments, renewals, implementation, notices, responses, termination, and retention.

name: Agreement Activation
description: Ability to cause an agreement to be in-force.

name: Agreement Termination
description: Ability to cancel or end an agreement in compliance with the terms of an agreement.

name: Agreement Renewal
description: Ability to update an agreement period or duration thereby extending an agreement in accordance with an agreement terms and conditions.

name: Agreement Compliance Determination
description: Ability to verify and establish that an agreement is executed in accordance to the terms and conditions, preferences, policy, and good practice.

name: Agreement Interpretation
description: Ability to quantify the terms and preferences that establish a baseline for determining compliance.

name: Agreement Compliance Gap Analysis
description: Ability to articulate the delta or differences between the interpreted baseline and actual actions taken as a result of or related to an agreement.

name: Agreement Risk Management
description: Ability to identify, assess, aggregate, articulate, and incorporate various exposures to harm, danger, or loss associated with an agreement.

name: Agreement Risk Level Determination
description: Ability to identify and define the level of risk associated with an agreement.

name: Agreement Risk Threshold Determination
description: Ability to identify and define the level of acceptable risk associated with an agreement.

name: Agreement Risk Aggregation
description: Ability to consider a collective set of risk factors about an agreement and represent them from a rationalized perspective.

name: Agreement Access Management
description: Ability to define, interpret, and enforce the right to view, use, or modify an agreement or its component parts.

name: Agreement Access Constraints Definition
description: Ability to determine access rights limitations for an agreement.

name: Agreement Access Constraints Interpretation
description: Ability to understand the access rights limitations for an agreement.

name: Agreement Access Enforcement
description: Ability to impose access rights limitations for an agreement.

name: Agreement Portfolio Management
description: Ability to articulate and evaluate a collective set of agreements with the intention of determining the value of, modifying, or optimizing the balance of that collective set of agreements.

name: Agreement Portfolio Articulation
description: Ability to determine if a collective set of agreements is meeting the threshold of expressed desires and expectations.

name: Agreement Portfolio Performance Determination
description: Ability to evaluate the performance of a collective set of agreements as input to possible optimization of that portfolio.

name: Biological Organism Management
